計\phi好似係equivalent to factoring (under poly-time reduction)?

replies.msg:
但n係exponential in input size
仲有計\phi係as least as hard as breaking RSA:

Let n = pq where p, q are distinct primes
\phi(n) = (p-1)(q-1) = n+1 - (p+q), so
p+q = n+1-\phi(n)
pq = n
可以solve p同q

Google左下, 見話計\phi同factoring係equivalent under poly-time randomized reduction (deterministic if assume some version of Riemann Hypothesis)

anal真係好正
難怪咁多人笑住咁爛grade

Let S = {0, 1, 1/2, ...}, (0, 1]\S同[0, 1]\S有咩bijection?
淨低既只要諗到S同S\{0}有咩bijection就problem solved

In general, 諗下點解任何兩個countably infinite sets都有bijection

replies.msg:
俾d信心check一check definition
(btw你會唔會係唔記得左bijection點定義？)
identity Id: A \to A係咪both injective and surjective?
injectivity: Let a, b in A. a =/= b im唔imply Id(a) =\= Id(b)?
surjectivity: 係咪for all y in A, there exists x in A such that Id(x) = y?

replies.msg:
Analysis係要d時間build up個intuition, 做多d exercise有幫助
有d位你初學會完全唔覺有問題
例如你就咁話take identity Id from (0, 1]\S to [0, 1]\S我都可以問你點解Id係well-defined for this domain and codomain
(因為(0, 1]\S同[0, 1]\S直程係一樣, in general要define到identity from A to B你要A係subset of B)
